name: Suckers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the sugar, corn syrup, and butter. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Add the food coloring and continue cooking until the mixture reaches 265 degrees on a candy thermometer (stirring occasionally).
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peppermint extract.
4. Place popsicle sticks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Using a spoon, drop about one tablespoon of the hot syrup onto each stick.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. When ready to decorate, mix the egg white and powdered sugar until smooth.
8. Dip the cooled suckers into the icing to coat evenly. Place on wax paper to set before serving.
